verses.text: Khatvei, Gennesaret Tuili gei-ah Jesuh dingin a om laitakin, mite in Pasian' thu zanuamin Jesuh hong nehcip uh hi
Jesuh in tui gei-ah gunkuang nih a om a mu hi. Tua gunkuang nei ngasa bengte a gunkuang panun tuakkhia-in tui sungah a ngente a sawp uh hi

Tua gunkuangte sung panin Simon' gunkuang sungah Jesuh tuang a, lei tawh tawm a kigamla zek dingin a gunkuang tawm a hawhna dingin Simon kiangah a gen hi. Tua ciangin gunkuang sungah tu a, tua lai panin thu a hilh hi
Thuhilh a tawp ciangin Simon kiangah, “Tui thukna lamah na gunkuang hot in la, na ngen tawh ngasa khuh in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Simon in, “Sia aw, tu zanthapai ngasa ka khuh uh hangin khat zong ka man kei uh hi. Ahi zongin khuh in, nong cih leh, ka khuh ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
A ngen a khuh leh ngasa tampi tak awk a, a ngen kikek dektak hi
A gunkuang dang khatah a om a lawmte hong pai-in a huhna dingun a khut uh a van uh hi. Amaute zong hong pai uh a, gunkuangte gel sungah ngasa a dimtakin guang uh ahih manin a gunkuang tum dektak hi
Simon Peter in hih thu a muh ciangin Jesuh' mai-ah khukdin' a, “Topa aw, kei mawhnei mi ka hih manin ka kiang panin paikhia in,” a ci hi
Tua zahin ngasa tampi a matna hangun amah leh a lawmte in lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi

Tua mah bangin Simon' lawmte ahi, Zebedi' tapa James leh Johan-te in zong lamdang a sa uh hi. Jesuh in Simon kiangah “Lau kei in. Tu-a kipanin ngasa mat bangin mi tampi a huaipa na suak ding hi,” a ci hi
Tui gei-ah a gunkuangte uh a tun'pih khit uh ciangin a na khempeuh uh nusia-in Jesuh a zui uh hi.

Khatvei, khuasung khatah Jesuh a om laitakin tua khuasungah a pumtangin phaknatna a vei mi khat a om hi. A phakpa in Jesuh a muh ciangin a mai-ah bokin, “Topa aw, hong damsak nuam peuh lecin kei nong damsak thei ding hi,” ci-in a thum hi
Jesuh in zong a khut zanin amah lawng a, “Kong damsak nuam hi; dam ta in,” ci-in a dawng hi. Tua khit phetin a phaknatna a dampah hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh in ama kiangah, “Hih thu kuamah dang kiangah gen kei in. Siampipa kiangah paisuakpah in la kivelsak in. Tua ciangin na damna thu a kilatna dingin Moses thupiak mah bangin biakna pia in,” ci-in thu a pia hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh' thu kitheithang semsem zawsop a, ama thu a ngai ding leh a natna panun damna a ngahna dingun mi tampi tak a hong pai uh hi
Ahi zongin gamdaihna munah Jesuh paikhia-in thu a ngen hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Khutlekhezaw Mi Khat Damsak

verses.text: Khatvei, Jesuh in thu hilhin a om laitakin Galilee gam, Judea gam, leh Jerusalem khua panin a hong pai Farisi mi pawlkhat leh Thukham hilh siate pawlkhat hong om hi. Cina damsak theihna ding Topa' vangliatna, Jesuh tungah kipia hi
Mi pawlkhat in khutlekhezaw mi khat a lupna phek tawh hong pua uh a, innsungah paipihin Jesuh mai-ah koihding a hanciam uh hi
Mihon tamlua ahih manin a lutpihna ding uh lampi omlo hi. Tua ahih ciangin innkhum zangah kahpihto-in innkhum hong let uh a, mihonte' lak, Jesuh' omna mai sanah a lupna phek tawh a khaisuk uh hi
Jesuh in amaute' upna a muh ciangin a mipa kiangah, “Lawm aw, na mawhnate hong kimaisak khinta hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siate leh Farisi mite in a lungsim sung uhah, “Hih bangin Pasian tawh a kikimin a pau ngam mipa kua ahi hiam? Mihing kuamah in mawhna maisak theilo a, Pasian bek in maisak thei hi,” a ci uh hi
Jesuh in amaute' ngaihsutna thei ahih manin amaute kiangah, “Bang hangin tua bangin ngaihsun na hi uh hiam
‘Na mawhnate hong kimaisak hi,’ cihding baihzaw ahi hiam, tua ahih kei leh, ‘Tho in la, lam pai in,’ cihding baihzaw ahi hiam

Mihing Tapa in mawhna maisak theihna ding leitungah vangliatna nei hi, ci-in na theihna dingun kong lak ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin khutlekhezaw mipa kiangah, “Tho in la na lupna pheek pua-in na inn-ah ciah in,” a ci hi
Thakhat thu-in amaute khempeuh' muhin a mipa zong tho-in a lupna pheek la a, Pasian phatkawmin a inn-ah a ciah hi
Tua ciangin amaute khempeuh in lamdangsa mahmah uh a, lau mahmah kawmin Pasian phatin, “Tuni-in a lamdang mahmah na khat i mu hi,” a ci uh hi.
Tua khit ciangin Jesuh paikhia a, siahdongpa Levi, a zumah a tu a mu hi. Jesuh in, “Kei hong zui in,” a ci hi
Levi zong dingpah a, a na khempeuh nusia-in Jesuh a zui hi
Tua ciangin Levi in ama inn-ah Jesuh vakna annek pawipi bawl a, annekna sabuai-ah siahdong dang tampite leh midangte zong tawh a tukhawm uh hi
Farisi mite leh amau sung panin Thukham hilh siate, nungzuite tungah phun uh a, “Bang hangin siahdongte leh thukham khial mite tawh an nekhawm na hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Cidamte in siavuan kisamlo uh a, cina mite bek in kisam uh hi
Mite in a zahtak mihoihte a kisikna dingun a sam dingin hong pai ka hi kei a, mite in a pampaih mite a kisikna dingun a sam dingin a hong pai ka hi hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.

Tua ciangin amaute pawlkhat in Jesuh kiangah, “Johan' nungzuite in an tangin thu ngen zelzel uh a, Farisi mite' nungzuite zong tua bangmahin gamta napi-in, bang hangin nangma nungzuite in tangloin om se uh ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi
Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Mo pawi-ah zineipa leh pawisimte a omkhawm laitakin a pawisimte an tangsak thei ding na hi uh hiam
Amaute kiang panin zineipa a kipaikhiatpih hun hong tung ding a, tua hun ciangin tang ding uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi

Tua ciangin Jesuh in thugentehna dang khat zong gen a, “Mi khat in puan thak khat eukhia-in puan lui thuapna-in neilo hi. Tua bangin hih leh a puan thak pen a keksak suak ding a, a puan thak eukhiat zong a puan lui tawh etlawmlo ding hi
Kuamah in savun um lui sungah leenggahzu a thak thun ngeilo hi. Thun zenzen leh leenggahzu thak in a savun um phukham ding a, a leenggahzu bua-in, a savun um zong kisia ding hi
Tua ahih manin savun um thak sungah leenggahzu thak a kikoih ding ahi hi
Kuamah in leenggahzu lui a nek khit ciangin a thak nenuam nawnlo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in, ‘A lui khumzaw hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi.
